hero.badge: Discover the power of well-crafted design
hero.subtext:
Your digital success starts with a well-designed interface.
Let's build something great together!

portfolioSection.label: Our work
portfolioSection.subtitle: Projects that blend aesthetics and performance to drive real results.
portfolioSection.intro: My portfolio brings together all my digital creations — from professional sites built for real projects to sample sites, blogs and experiments made for fun or to test new ideas. Here you get an overview of my style, evolution and how I build products: with a focus on quality, organization and great experience on any screen.

servicesSection.label: SERVICES
servicesSection.title: From briefing to deploy,
servicesSection.titleAccent: with a focus on conversion and scale.
servicesSection.description: Each project is designed for your business context.
servicesSection.more: Need something more specific or recurring volume?
servicesSection.moreAccent: See the full services list and the agency format.

processSection.label: PROCESS
processSection.title: A lean, predictable flow ready for
processSection.description: Clear scope, objective checkpoints, and full handoff. You know exactly what happens at each stage — from briefing to deploy — with no rework and no surprises.

steps.title: 01 — Context & briefing
steps.text: I learn your business, audience, offer, and project goals. I align references and constraints (timeline, content, integrations) so we start with clear direction.
steps.youReceive: You get: requirements checklist + initial map of deliverables.

steps.title: 02 — Scope alignment
steps.text: We define what goes into V1 (priorities) and what's left for later. This avoids endless scope and ensures a fast, quality delivery.
steps.youReceive: You get: locked scope + page/section list + definition of done.

steps.title: 03 — Structure & prototype
steps.text: I organize page architecture, navigation, and content hierarchy with conversion and experience in mind (mobile-first).
steps.youReceive: You get: light wireframe/prototype + section and CTA roadmap.

steps.title: 04 — Implementation
steps.text: Building the layout with reusable components, responsive and ready to scale. Essential integrations go here (forms, WhatsApp, tracking, booking, etc.).
steps.youReceive: You get: navigable version + preview/staging for quick validation.

steps.title: 05 — Guided revisions
steps.text: Rounds of adjustments focused on what matters: clarity, visual consistency, performance, and conversion. No endless back-and-forth.
steps.youReceive: You get: prioritized changes + quality checklist (UX/SEO/performance).

steps.title: 06 — Delivery & handoff
steps.text: Organized delivery so your agency/team can continue without depending on you. Code, deploy, env vars, docs, and maintenance guidance.
steps.youReceive: You get: repo/documentation + deploy checklist + suggested next steps.

guarantees: No rework: scope and definition of done agreed up front

aboutSection.label: ABOUT
aboutSection.title: From idea to live product — sites, systems, and automations with a professional standard.
aboutSection.paragraph1: I'm a developer focused on building clear, fast, and maintainable digital experiences — from landing pages and institutional sites to internal software, automations, and SaaS. My goal is to turn business needs into ready-to-use solutions, with solid structure and delivery quality.
aboutSection.paragraph2: I work with both agencies (white-label and technical support) and businesses that want to sell more and run better. For agencies, I deliver speed, consistency, and a clean handoff. For businesses, I deliver digital presence, integrations, and automations that cut manual work and boost results.
aboutSection.highlight: Clear scope. Fast communication. Predictable delivery. Continuous evolution.
oQueVoceGanha: Speed with quality: delivery in stages with checkpoints
Production-ready: performance, baseline SEO, and tracking when needed
Continuity: documentation and structure to evolve without pain

contactSection.label: CONTACT
contactSection.title: Let's get your project live with clarity and speed.
contactSection.description:
Send me the project type, timeline, and 2–3 references (or a site you like). I'll reply with a proposed path: V1 scope, estimated timeline, and next steps.
That’s enough for me to reply with a realistic path.
oQueAconteceDepois: I read your message and confirm details
We start with a checklist and first delivery
